description: Product Description Beryris keep your child’s skin healthy and soft with natural bamboo washcloths designed for plush, absorbent comfort. Whether it’s your newborn’s first bath at home or you’re scrubbing away the dirt after your toddler has played outside all day, you want to protect their skin and keep it soft and supple. That’s why we created natural Bamboo Washcloths designed with naturally hypoallergenic fibers. Gentle on even the most sensitive skin, these premium washcloths let you scrub behind their ears, between their little toes, and on their super soft bottoms without leaving behind irritation The bamboo material is made from bamboo plants which are grown in an organic way, free from the influence of harmful chemicals . After the plants are processed, the fibers are used to weave the fabric Best quality towels Gentle, Safe – Crafted with sustainable bamboo fibers, our baby washcloths are free of chemicals so they won’t irritate or scratch delicate skin. Beryris bamboo washcloth adopts new production technology of bamboo fiber washcloth, and under the circumstance that doesn’t reduce softness, the firmness of products has been improved a lot. The product greatly reduces the phenomenon of skipped stitches and snagging and becomes more durable, and its water absorbability is twice or three times as good as that of cotton towel. They're thick, soft and the perfect size to use during your baby's bath I like that they're organic and dye-free so I'm not worried about using cloths made from harsh chemicals and dyes on your baby's sensitive skin More colour for your choice High quality towels with 550GSM they are soft like water protect baby`s sensitive skin.
